parameters.content:
## Outreach.io -> fact_outreach_step_daily  (per-step engagement, snapshot)

Feeds the "Engagement by Step" panel (open/reply rate per step 1..N).

FLOW: Get Sequences (for id->name) -> Build map -> Get Sequence Steps (paginated) ->
      inherit region/pillar from parent sequence name -> upsert.

NOTES:
- Pre-wired to the "Outreach Sequence" OAuth2 credential (needs sequenceSteps.read scope).
- Per-step counters are LIFETIME totals -> activity_date = run date (snapshot; same-day re-run upserts).
- Pagination follows links.next (handles >1000 steps). Grain: one row per step per day.
- step_type covers email/call/linkedin/task; the panel typically filters to email steps.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_outreach_step_daily
  (activity_date, sequence_id, step_id, region_id, pillar_id, step_order, step_type,
   delivered, opens, clicks, replies, bounces, opt_outs, source)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $4),
  (SELECT pillar_id FROM dim_practice_pillar WHERE pillar_name = $5),
  $6, $7, $8, $9, $10, $11, $12, $13, 'outreach')
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_outreach_step_grain DO UPDATE SET
  sequence_id = EXCLUDED.sequence_id, region_id = EXCLUDED.region_id, pillar_id = EXCLUDED.pillar_id,
  step_order = EXCLUDED.step_order, step_type = EXCLUDED.step_type,
  delivered = EXCLUDED.delivered, opens = EXCLUDED.opens, clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  replies = EXCLUDED.replies, bounces = EXCLUDED.bounces, opt_outs = EXCLUDED.opt_outs,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('outreach_steps', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, 0, 0);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $('Map Steps → Fact Rows').all().length, $('Map Steps → Fact Rows').all().length ] }}
